div.head: The Ambassador in Pakistan (Warren) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 109. Burmese AmbU Pe Kin, Burmese Ambassador in Pakistan. told me Sat midnight his govt approaching simultaneously Prime Ministers Indonesia,Sukiman Wirjosanjojo. India and Pak with proposal the Prime Ministers of Indonesia and BurmaThakin Nu. make joint visit to Delhi and Karachi and offer their good offices to Nehru and Liaquat to ease tension between the two countries which Burmese view with increasing alarm particularly about their own future. He said he was approaching Liaquat, that Burmese FonMinSao Hkun Hkio. then visiting Delhi was talking to Nehru, and Burmese Prime Minister had communicated direct with Prime Minister of Indonesia. Proposal was being kept quiet and asked me to wait a day before saying anything about it.

Last night at a dinner given by the Prime Minister for the GovGenKhwaja Nazimuddin, Governor-General of Pakistan. Burmese Amb told me proposal was all off. He said Liaquat was favorably inclined, the Prime Minister of Indonesia was also disposed to make the visit in company of Burmese Prime Minister, but Nehru had told the Burmese FonMin he wld not go along.
